---
applyTo: "specs/archive/**"
description: "Use when reading archived Bowties specs or design docs. Archived specs are historical reference only and must not be used as the source of truth for current architecture, UI behavior, naming, or requirements."
---

# Archived Specs

Files under `specs/archive/` are retained for project history only.

- Treat these files as historical context, not active requirements.
- Do not infer current UI behavior, terminology, or architecture from these files without confirming against active specs and current code.
- If an archived document conflicts with current implementation or newer non-archived specs, the archived document loses.
- For current configuration UI behavior, prefer the sidebar plus element card deck implementation and the current architecture documentation.
